channel.title: Meshy AI
channel.description: Meshy AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: How to Create Minecraft 3D Models in 2026 - Blog
item.description: Create Minecraft 3D models with AI, Blockbench, Blender, and world exporters. Step-by-step tips for prep, modeling, texturing, and exporting for resource packs, renders, or 3D printing.

item.title: Meshy Workspace 3.0: Instant AI 3D Generation, Task-Oriented Workflows, and Unified Asset Management - Blog
item.description: Meshy Workspace 3.0 rebuilds AI 3D creation with a new Discover creation bar, task-oriented modules for Image, 3D Model, 3D Printing, and Animate, and unified asset management.
